page.title: Credits
page.description: Money you've given to or received from friends & family

empty.title: No credits yet
empty.description: Track money you give to or receive from friends and family — optionally reflect it in your accounts.

form.methodHelp: How the money moved (GPay, PhonePe, …) — just a record, separate from which account changes.
form.reflectOn: Adds a transaction and updates the selected account's balance.
form.reflectOff: Tracked only here on the Credits page — your accounts and transactions stay untouched.
form.accountHelp: The bank/cash account whose balance moves (e.g. your HDFC account that GPay & PhonePe draw from).

toast.selectAccount: Select an account to reflect this in your balances

gold.title: Gold & Silver
gold.description: Live precious-metal rates in ₹ · auto-refreshed daily, or refresh now
gold.notConfiguredTitle: Gold tracking isn’t set up yet
gold.notConfiguredDesc: Add a free GOLD_API_KEY (from goldapi.io) to the server environment to enable daily gold & silver rates.
gold.noRatesDesc: The first snapshot will appear after the next daily fetch. Check back shortly.
gold.historyBuildingDesc: A new data point is added each day — check back tomorrow.
gold.disclaimer: Spot from goldapi.io (international spot × ₹). Chennai shows GRT Jewellers’ published counter rate (from grtjewels.com); other cities estimate spot + a local premium (duty, GST & margin) and exclude making charges. Refreshed automatically once a day, or on demand with the refresh button above (max once every 15 minutes).
